items.title: Core formatter
items.goal: Ship a reusable progress formatter with correct overflow handling.
criteria: formatProgress returns a human-readable completion string
overflow values are clamped to 100 percent
unit tests cover formatter and clamp behavior
items.sequencing_rationale: Everything else depends on the formatter contract being stable first.

items.title: Caching strategy
items.goal: Determine whether caching is necessary and document the decision.
criteria: identify whether caching should be added or skipped
items.sequencing_rationale: The project has explicit uncertainty around caching, so humans should review findings before more scope is committed.
